name: player
description: The crossword player app. Consumes @crossword/core; deploys to /crossword/.

scripts.test: for t in layout paint typing clue advance kbd stuck solve wrong; do echo "--- $t"; node test/$t-test.cjs || exit 1; done
scripts.test:webkit: ENGINE=webkit node test/layout-test.cjs && ENGINE=webkit node test/paint-test.cjs
